creator: thierry@FreeBSD.org
text:
I'm using https://github.com/cross-platform-actions/action#readme to install some packages with `pkg install' and it has been notified during one of these session, and I missed this line in the Makefile.

I surely got a package built before your update, and the next ones should be fine, thanks!

BTW, when py-tomli is installed, I guess that you could remove textproc/py-toml.
